joke: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired!
Why did the math book look so sad? Because it had too many problems!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged!
Why did the calendar go to therapy? It was feeling too dated!
Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the pillow go to the doctor? It was feeling down!
Why did the music teacher go to jail? Because she got caught with too many sharp objects!
Why did the computer go to the doctor? Because it had a virus!
Why did the fisherman bring a pencil to the lake? To draw his own conclusions!
Why did the librarian get kicked off the plane? Because it was overbooked!
Why did the dog sit in the shade? Because he didn't want to be a hot dog!
Why did the cloud break up with the lightning? It found the relationship too shocking!
Why did the banker break up with his girlfriend? He lost interest!
Why did the ghost go to the party? Because he heard it was going to be a boo-last!
Why did the paper go to school? To become a little brighter!
Why did the cat sit on the computer? Because it wanted to keep an eye on the mouse!
Why did the shoe go to therapy? Because it had too many sole-searching issues!
Why did the mirror break up with the wall? It just couldn't see itself staying there anymore!
Why did the tree go to the dentist? To get a root canal!
Why did the lamp go to school? Because it wanted to be a little brighter!
Why did the broom get a promotion? Because it was always sweeping the competition!
Why did the astronaut break up with his girlfriend? Because he needed space!
Why did the telephone break up with the fax machine? It just couldn't handle the connection!
Why did the chess piece go to therapy? Because it felt like it was always being played!
Why did the firefighter wear red suspenders? To keep his pants up while sliding down the pole!
Why did the invisible man turn down the job offer? He couldn't see himself doing it!
Why did the window break up with the door? It just couldn't handle the pane anymore!
